description: 6 mid-lifetime constraint updates for S2-hard. Includes strengthening, relaxation, reversals, and cross-constraint cascades.

updates.old_rule: Sodium under 550mg per serving. If sodium is between 550-700mg, flag it but allow if I confirm. Over 700mg is always rejected.
updates.new_rule: Sodium under 450mg per serving. 450-600mg requires confirmation. Over 600mg always rejected. Doctor said my blood pressure is borderline.
updates.update_text: My doctor said my blood pressure is borderline high. Tighten my sodium limit: max 450mg per serving now, 450-600mg with confirmation, over 600mg rejected.

updates.old_rule: Maximum 6 active subscriptions at any time. Current count: Spotify ($10.99), iCloud ($2.99), NYT ($4.25), gym ($45). That's 4, so 2 slots remain.
updates.new_rule: Maximum 6 active subscriptions. Current count: Spotify ($10.99), iCloud ($2.99), NYT ($4.25), gym ($45), Duolingo ($7.99). That's 5, so 1 slot remains.
updates.update_text: I just subscribed to Duolingo Plus for $7.99/month. Update my subscription count — I should have 1 slot remaining now.

updates.old_rule: Dining budget: $185/month maximum. Track cumulative spend.
updates.new_rule: Dining budget: $220/month maximum. Track cumulative spend.
updates.update_text: I got a raise! Increase my dining budget to $220/month.

updates.old_rule: Gym sessions: Monday/Wednesday/Friday before 7:15 AM only. Weekend sessions allowed until 9:00 AM.
updates.new_rule: Gym sessions: Tuesday/Thursday/Saturday before 6:45 AM only. My work schedule changed.
updates.update_text: My work schedule changed. Move my gym days to Tuesday/Thursday/Saturday, and I need to be there earlier — before 6:45 AM.

updates.old_rule: Credit card usage: Amex Blue for dining (3% back), Chase Sapphire for travel (5x points), Citi Double for everything else (2% back).
updates.new_rule: Credit card usage: Amex Gold for dining (4x points), Chase Sapphire for travel (5x points), Citi Double for everything else (2% back). Switched from Amex Blue to Amex Gold.
updates.update_text: I upgraded from Amex Blue to Amex Gold — now I get 4x points on dining instead of 3% cash back. Update my card preferences.

updates.old_rule: Dining budget: $220/month maximum. Track cumulative spend.
updates.new_rule: Dining budget: $175/month maximum. Track cumulative spend. Tightening up for holiday savings.
updates.update_text: Actually, I need to save for the holidays. Cut my dining budget back to $175/month.
